hero.subtitle: Pick your contract scenario, upload, and get industry-specific AI review in 3 minutes.
hero.trust: Free trial · Sign in to scan · 1 review included · Encrypted

step1.title: Upload Contract
step1.desc: Supports PDF & DOCX. Drag and drop or click to select. Your file is encrypted end-to-end and auto-deleted after analysis.

step2.title: AI Clause-by-Clause Review
step2.desc: Our LLM scans the full text, flagging high-risk clauses: indemnification, non-compete, auto-renewal, unilateral termination, IP ownership, and more.

step3.title: Report & Recommendations
step3.desc: A clear risk score + clause-by-clause breakdown + suggested edits. Copy and send to the other party — negotiate with confidence.

perks.label: Beta perks
perks.title: Founding member benefits
items: Lifetime 30% off Pro for founding members
Founding Member badge on your account

trust.line: v0.9-beta · 50+ unit tests green · SHA-256 privacy-first (hash only, never store contract body in feedback)

items.a: Scans use your document for the active review only. Product feedback stores a SHA-256 hash of normalized text — never the contract body. We do not train models on your uploads.
Shipping packs include China (PRC), California, New York / US general, England & Wales, and international commercial. Community packs can be contributed via our open Pack guide.
Beta members flag Accurate / Missed Issue / False Positive on report items. Those signals become a golden set to improve prompts — you co-create the quality bar with us.
No. ClauseCheck is decision support and negotiation material. High-stakes deals still need qualified counsel.

Your email joins the beta list and locks founding-perk eligibility (credited at official launch). Signing up does not create an account — use “Sign Up to Try Now” or “Try the product” to register and scan with your free trial quota. We also email updates in waves.

footerCta.title: Ready to co-create?
footerCta.subtitle: Same form. Same founding perks. No hard sell.

items.q: Is my contract secure and private?
items.a: Uploaded files are used only for the current scan and are immediately deleted from our servers afterward. All transfers are HTTPS-encrypted. We never store, view, or reuse your contract content.

items.q: How accurate is the AI? Can it replace a lawyer?
items.a: Our AI covers common risk areas such as indemnification, non-compete, auto-renewal, and IP ownership. It provides decision support only — not legal advice — and cannot replace a licensed attorney on high-stakes contracts.
PDF (text-based, not scanned images), DOCX (Word), and TXT plain text. Image OCR is not yet supported.

items.q: What are the Free tier limits?
items.a: After sign-up, Trial includes 1 document review per billing cycle, up to 20,000 characters each, with standard AI analysis. Full online reports and PDF download are included; cloud history and Word revision workbook export require Pro or an add-on pack.

items.q: How long does a scan take?
items.a: Most scans complete within 10-30 seconds, depending on contract length. You'll see real-time progress as the AI reviews your document clause by clause.

items.q: Will my data be used to train AI models?
items.a: No. We use OpenAI's API under their business data protection terms. Your contract content is never used to train or improve AI models — not by us, not by OpenAI.

items.q: Can I cancel my Pro subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. Cancel anytime from your account page — no questions asked, no cancellation fees. You'll retain Pro access until the end of your billing period.

items.q: What types of contracts work best?
items.a: Employment agreements, lease contracts, service agreements, NDAs, freelance contracts, and partnership agreements all work great. The AI is trained on a wide range of commercial and consumer contract types.

meta.title: Jurisdiction Pack Bounty | ClauseCheck Community
meta.description: Help ClauseCheck cover your legal system. Claim a bounty, scaffold a Jurisdiction Pack, and earn Lifetime Pro (and cash for High priority).

communityBounty.heroTitle: Jurisdiction Pack Bounty: Help Us Cover Your Legal System
communityBounty.heroSub: Co-create decision-support Packs with practitioners who know the law on the ground. {openCount} open slots — High priority includes Lifetime Pro and a cash thank-you.
communityBounty.disclaimer: Community packs are reviewed but not guaranteed. Always verify. Not legal advice.
communityBounty.boardLead: Status refreshes from GitHub Issues labeled
communityBounty.boardLeadAfter: (hourly). Claim via Issue before starting work.

steps.title: Read Docs
steps.body: Learn the Pack interface, naming, and review constraints.

steps.title: Scaffold
steps.body: Generate pack + tests + registry wiring with one command.

steps.title: Test
steps.body: Add ± pattern tests and pass AI / local pre-check.

steps.title: PR
steps.body: Open a pull request; CI validates packs/ changes.

items.a: We check (1) jurisdiction-specific guidance without restating Base, (2) distinctive governing-law patterns with ± tests, (3) token budget and validate:pack, (4) paste-ready suggestion norms. Legal accuracy is reviewed in good faith by maintainers and community peers — not a bar certification.

After your PR merges and the pack ships to production (or is marked Completed on the bounty issue). Lifetime / 1-year Pro is provisioned within 7 business days; cash rewards for High priority are paid after a short verification email.

Yes — claim the bounty issue first (assign yourself), then collaborate on one PR. Split credit in the PR description; we list all named contributors on the pack credits page. First clear claim on an Open bounty is respected unless abandoned (>14 days with no PR).

By opening a PR you license your contribution under the same terms as the repository (see LICENSE). You retain credit as author. Do not paste confidential client work or copyrighted statute text verbatim beyond short fair-use citations.

communityBounty.footerLead: Open a GitHub Issue with the bounty template — we will coordinate review and reward fulfillment from there.
communityBounty.footerDisclaimer: Community packs are reviewed but not guaranteed. Always verify.
